reviews.review_description: I hope you keep working on it dont mind the other reviews believe in yourself

reviews.review_title: How do you get the hook?
reviews.review_description: This is confusing and hard

The overall game is okay, the concept of parkour isn’t new but an awesome one. Now the game it self isn’t too spectacular, the game works fine but make sure your controllers work well beforehand. this game requires both hands and would be easier without other factors such as stick drift and poor tracking. The are only seven courses so you will get bored fast the multiplayer is kinda.. bad but I never really had a problem other than the lack of players.  The overall experience is okay, my favorite thing to do is use the hooks for everything like climbing and going down the zip lines.
This game gave me crazy stick drift🤬
This game is so ####ing bad DO NOT BUY
I can't finish the tutorial
Love this idea, but needs a single player option -please.  A lot of fun.

developer_response.body: v1.0.0.3.1 will now have single player :)

reviews.review_description: Honestly this game is super creative and has a lot of potential. If the game gets a bit more polished and starts to amass a decent playerbase this could be so much more. There isn’t enough people online to get into a match, so single player would be nice, but the game is really cool.

developer_response.body: v1.0.0.3.1 will now have single player :)

reviews.review_description: The game is pretty well made and the obstacles are quite challenging! Grab a friends and you will have plenty of fun!
the hooking on level 4 suck. I am just trying to hook the red one and it is perfectly lined up  to hook but it just fall hate that fix it right away but otherwise it’s a fine game
there is so much potential in this game. It isn’t 100% yet but this game is going to be one of my favorites.

When you are playing by yourself, it is a really good game! Good job👍. But playing it multiplayer is a whole different story. If there are more than 2 people, the whole game starts to lag like hell till the point where it’s unplayable. Fix this please!
It’s a W game my favorite was the selection level so I may play again

reviews.review_title: best free vr parkour game i ever played
reviews.review_description: feeling alive

Me and my friends recently got this game it is a very good game to have some fun with friends and it is a bit buggy but that adds ro the fun. My main concern is the grapple system but It isn't that hard to over come. The main thing that I love about this game is the character models they just add an element of goofyness and its so funny just seeing them plummet into the abyss. Overall this game is highly recommended and great with friends.
So I’m left handed and after getting this game I was so mad about how I can’t play because I’m left handed it is so annoying
L game

reviews.review_title: Definitely give this game a shot
reviews.review_description: It's free so you can't lose.  I really like the way it plays.  Sure it could be a little "prettier" but it plays great.  The only thing it's missing are the players and that's something only YOU can fix.
You can't grapple this game doesn't have multi-player this game is terrible don't recommend

i wish this got more exposure, two things i can complain about is the ending of the tutorial, and arena 1,
the ending to the tutorial has this obstacle where you put the handle of ur hooks into the slots, simple right? no, 1 it’s hard to flip the hooks to hold them correctly, 2 if the handle of the hook isn’t fully in, then you ain’t making it to the next slot. now arena 1, simple first level, small parkour , dodge recking balls, but the the side ways ladders, for the life of me i could never make it up of even TO the second half of that obstacle! this game is pretty unfair at times but i do like mostly everything else.
